name: current_board
full_help:
current_board

Description: 
Get the current board object

Syntax: 
current_board  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
current board object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, Board

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
